subcodes.first_line: Say: All praise be unto Thee, O my God, for that which Thou hast bestowed upon me through Thy grace and bounty, and hast guided me unto Thy Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قولی لک الحمد یا الهی بما انعمت علی بفضلک و جودک و هدیتنی الی ملکوتک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement
